evals.prompt: Commit my changes. I fixed a race condition in the WebSocket reconnection logic where the retry timer wasn't being cleared on successful reconnect, causing duplicate connections.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted commit message with a plain-language title and technical bullet points

evals.prompt: Please commit. I added search functionality to the contacts page — it filters by name and email using a debounced input, and I added a Postgres trigram index to keep it fast.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted commit message with a plain-language title and technical bullet points

evals.prompt: Commit this. I refactored the auth middleware to extract token validation into its own module so it can be reused by both the REST and GraphQL endpoints.
evals.expected_output: A well-formatted commit message with a plain-language title and technical bullet points
